title: Nippon Steel Shares Tumble on Concern Over Massive Bond Sale
description: Nippon Steel Corp. shares slumped after the company said it planned to sell almost $4 billion of bonds to help fund the acquisition of United States Steel Corp.
content: Nippon Steel Corp. shares slumped after the company said it planned to sell almost $4 billion of bonds to help fund the acquisition of United States Steel Corp.
